g.text: Ontology Diagram Editor - Event Emission and Consumption
sync selection back to ontology item
Model tree item dropped on canvas
theme, ontology, or image file changed
Events carry the diagram file path plus the changed identifiers or payload
fields subscribers need. Components react through events rather than reading
webview DOM state or duplicating persistence logic.
Preview updates are emitted during interaction but are not persisted.
Only completed gestures become document edits.
Solid arrows: command, state change, or emitted event
Persistence events: document updated -> save requested -> saved/failed
